name: listSheetsComments
description: Lists all comments in a Google Spreadsheet. Filter by sheet name, specific row(s), specific cell, or a cell range. Returns comment IDs needed for getSheetsComment, replyToSheetsComment, resolveSheetsComment, or deleteSheetsComment.

spreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Sheets URL.

sheetName.description: Optional: filter comments to only this sheet/tab name.

row.description: Optional: filter to comments on this specific row number (1-based, e.g., 5 for row 5).

rows.description: Optional: filter to comments on any of these row numbers (1-based, e.g., [3, 5, 12]). Ignored if "row" is set.

cell.description: Optional: filter to comments on this specific cell in A1 notation (e.g., "B3"). Overrides row/rows filters.

range.description: Optional: filter to comments within this A1 range (e.g., "A1:D10", "B:B" for entire column B). Overrides row/rows/cell filters.

includeResolved.description: If true, include resolved comments. Defaults to false.
